name: roc-mcp-server
description: Creator commerce intelligence for TikTok Shop brands. GMV benchmarks, ROC calculator, creator profiles, content format rankings, commission guidance, and brand fit analysis — powered by 100+ brands and $20M+ GMV processed on the RoC platform.

tools.name: roc_get_category_benchmarks
tools.description: Get median and top-quartile monthly GMV, average order value, creator activation rates, and top content formats by product category.

tools.name: roc_calculate_projected_roc
tools.description: Calculate projected Return on Creators (ROC) multiple using vertical-specific coefficients from real campaign data.

tools.name: roc_get_creator_profile
tools.description: Get ideal creator tier, engagement benchmarks, recruitment targets, sample strategy, and match scoring rubric for a brand.

tools.name: roc_get_content_formats
tools.description: Get highest-converting TikTok Shop content formats ranked by GMV contribution for a given product category.

tools.name: roc_get_commission_guidance
tools.description: Get market-rate commission guidance with tiered structure, per-sale dollar value, and sample strategy by category and price point.

tools.name: roc_analyze_brand_fit
tools.description: Run a full brand fit analysis — fit score, positive signals, blockers, and expected GMV range for TikTok Shop creator marketing.

tools.name: roc_get_tiktok_shop_readiness
tools.description: Assess TikTok Shop launch readiness with a prioritized action plan and readiness score.

tools.name: roc_get_amplifier_fit
tools.description: Creator program gap analysis — current vs needed creator count, top constraints, GMV projections, and weekly priority actions.
